questions.q: Write a speech to be delivered in the school assembly on the topic 'Importance of Discipline in Life'.
questions.answer: A well-structured speech with introduction, main points and conclusion.

questions.q: Which of the following is a key feature of a good speech?
Fill in the blank: A good speech should have a _______ tone to engage the audience.
True or False: A speech should always be written in a formal tone.
Write a short speech on the topic 'Save Water, Save Life' to be delivered in a community meeting.
questions.answer: A brief speech with main points and conclusion.

questions.q: What is the primary purpose of a speech?
questions.answer: To inform, to persuade or to entertain

questions.q: Write a speech to be delivered in a school function on the topic 'Role of Youth in Nation Building'.
questions.answer: A well-structured speech with introduction, main points and conclusion.

questions.q: Which of the following is NOT a key element of a good speech?
Fill in the blank: A good speech should have a clear _______ to convey the message effectively.
True or False: A speech should always be delivered in a monotone voice.
